36 │   %3  = intrinsic mul_float(%1, %2)::Float64
   │   %4  = dynamic invoke sin(%1::Float64)::Float64

   │   %7  = intrinsic add_float(1.0, %6)::Float64

38 │   %9  = intrinsic mul_float(0.1, %1)::Float64
   │   %10 = intrinsic mul_float(%9, %1)::Float64
39 │   %11 = intrinsic mul_float(%5, %8)::Float64
   │   %12 = intrinsic add_float(%11, %10)::Float64
   └──       return %12

source:
function mini_objective(x)
    a, b = x
    residual = a * b + sin(a)
    scale = 1.0 / (1.0 + b * b)
    penalty = 0.1 * a * a
    return residual * scale + penalty
end
title: Small numerical kernel
description: A compact multi-line objective over two scalars. It keeps the trace readable while showing named intermediates, scalar arithmetic, sin, division, and a quadratic penalty.
